title: TS Intermediate Supplementary Exam Time Table 2026 OUT

detail.title: TS Intermediate Supplementary Exam Time Table 2026 OUT
detail.short_info: TS Intermediate Supplementary Time Table 2026 has been released. Check Telangana Inter supply exam dates, subject-wise schedule, timings, and download the official time table PDF. Stay updated with latest TS Inter exam notifications.

sections.heading: TS Intermediate Supplementary Exam Time Table 2026 OUT

content.text: The Telangana State Board of Intermediate Education (TGBIE) has officially released the TS Intermediate Supplementary Exam Time Table 2026 for 1st and 2nd year students of both General and Vocational streams. The supplementary examinations are scheduled to be conducted in May/June 2026. Students can check the complete theory and practical exam schedule on the official website - tgbie.cgg.gov.in.

Students can download the TS Intermediate Supplementary Exam Time Table 2026 using their registration details if required on the portal. It is advised to verify all dates and timings carefully from the official notification and contact the board in case of any discrepancy.
Download the TS Intermediate Supplementary Exam Time Table 2026 PDF here

sections.heading: TS Intermediate Supplementary Exam Time Table 2026 Overview

content.text: The TS Intermediate Supplementary Exam Time Table 2026 provides detailed dates for theory examinations in two sessions - Forenoon and Afternoon. Practical examinations will be held from 22-05-2026 to 25-05-2026. The schedule applies to both 1st year and 2nd year students appearing for the Intermediate Public Advanced Supplementary Examinations.

rows: Telangana State Board of Intermediate Education (TGBIE)

sections.heading: TS Intermediate Supplementary Exam Time Table 2026 Subject Wise

content.text: Students can now check the complete TS Intermediate Supplementary Exam Time Table 2026 subject wise for 1st year and 2nd year. The theory exams will be conducted in two sessions daily - Forenoon (9:00 AM to 12:00 Noon) and Afternoon (2:30 PM to 5:30 PM). The detailed date-wise schedule for all subjects is given below.

headers: 1st Year Examinations (Forenoon Session) Time: 9:00 A.M. to 12:00 Noon
2nd Year Examinations (Afternoon Session) Time: 2:30 P.M. to 5:30 P.M.
rows: PART-III: MATHEMATICS PAPER-IA BOTANY PAPER-I POLITICAL SCIENCE PAPER-I
PART-III: MATHEMATICS PAPER-IIA BOTANY PAPER-II POLITICAL SCIENCE PAPER-II
PUBLIC ADMINISTRATION PAPER-I BRIDGE COURSE MATHS PAPER-I (FOR B.I.P.C. STUDENTS)
PUBLIC ADMINISTRATION PAPER-II BRIDGE COURSE MATHS PAPER-II (FOR B.I.P.C. STUDENTS)

content.text: Note: The above dates are applicable to Intermediate Vocational Courses Examinations also. However, the Vocational Courses Time-Table will be issued separately.

sections.heading: How to Download TS Intermediate Supplementary Exam Time Table 2026

content.text: Students can easily download the TS Intermediate Supplementary Exam Time Table 2026 from the official TGBIE website. The process is simple and takes only a few minutes.

items: Visit the official website of Telangana Board of Intermediate Education at tgbie.cgg.gov.in
On the homepage, look for the latest notifications or examination section
Click on the link that reads "TS Intermediate Supplementary Exam Time Table 2026" or "IPASE May/June 2026 Time Table"
The official PDF will open on your screen
Click the download button to save the time table PDF on your device
Take a printout for future reference and exam preparation

content.text: Important Tip: Always cross-check the exam dates and timings from the official timetable and keep a printed copy handy during your preparation.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in TS Intermediate Supplementary Exam Time Table 2026

content.text: The official TS Intermediate Supplementary Exam Time Table 2026 contains all essential information required for students appearing in the advanced supplementary examinations. Here are the key details mentioned in the document.

items: Board Name: Telangana State Board of Intermediate Education (TGBIE)
Examination Name: Intermediate Public Advanced Supplementary Examinations, May/June 2026
Practical Examination Period: 22-05-2026 (Friday) to 25-05-2026 (Monday)
English Practical Examination: 26-05-2026 (Tuesday)
Ethics and Human Values Examination: 26-05-2026 (Tuesday) for eligible students
Environmental Education Examination: 28-05-2026 (Thursday)
Theory Examination Timings: Forenoon Session 9:00 AM to 12:00 Noon, Afternoon Session 2:30 PM to 5:30 PM
Subjects covered for 1st Year and 2nd Year (Part-I, Part-II, Part-III)
Special instructions for Vocational stream students
Official signature and date of release: 12-04-2026
